name: prompt-composer
title: Prompt Composer
description: An AI prompt input block with action shortcuts, attachment control, and suggestion chips.

meta.usage: Use as a hero prompt box, agent command bar, or AI app launcher. Connect onPromptSubmit to your chat, agent, or workflow endpoint.

examples.title: Custom suggestions
examples.code: <PromptComposer suggestions={[{ label: "Landing page", prompt: "Build a landing page for " }, { label: "Dashboard", prompt: "Create a dashboard that tracks " }]} />
